description: Testing and QA documentation corpus for SWEObeyMe
purpose: Provide comprehensive testing and QA documentation for extension development

documents.title: Getting Started with the Jest Framework
documents.author: Sauce Labs
documents.description: Comprehensive guide to Jest testing framework

instructions.addingDocuments: Place resources in appropriate subdirectories. Update this index.json with document metadata including title, author, description, license, topics, and relevance.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from Jest documentation, testing framework sites, and reputable testing resources. Prioritize official documentation.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear, descriptive filenames with underscores: framework_name.html, pattern_name.md
instructions.licenseCompliance: Include license information for all resources. Prioritize official documentation.
instructions.testingFocus: Resources should enable SWEObeyMe to: (1) understand testing frameworks, (2) implement testing patterns, (3) write unit tests, (4) write integration tests, (5) follow testing best practices.
